C0300A BIMS: Temporal Orientation - Able to Report Correct Year - The data in this column identifies how closely the patient knew the current year. CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies how closely the patient knew the current year. 0 = Missed by 5 years or no answer
1 = Missed by 2 - 5 years
2 = Missed by 1 year
3 = Correct
